recentSpecs.description: Fix the token bar threshold to yellow at 60%
recentSpecs.spec:
Target: mission-control.html
Location: renderResources() function
Change: Yellow threshold from 75% to 60%, red from 90% to 85%
Constraint: Only modify renderResources, nothing else
recentSpecs.result: Queue watcher not yet activated — spec stuck in processing

recentSpecs.description: Fix factory floor idle flicker — double-buffer canvas, worker wander, lastTime init
recentSpecs.spec:
Target: mission-control.html
Fix: Double-buffer canvas to eliminate flicker, fix worker wander bounds, initialize lastTime properly
recentSpecs.result: Applied 3 patches: offscreen canvas buffer, wander boundary clamp, lastTime = -1 sentinel
